function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo and return the top results (title + snippet). Use this to look up real-time information, current events, prices, documentation, app package names, or anything that may be outdated in your training data. Do NOT use this for tasks that don't need live data.

query.description: The search query. Be concise and specific. Use keywords rather than full sentences for better results.

max_results.description: Number of results to return (1–10). Defaults to 5.
